chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No.139 of 1997 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of C.M.A 1169/2015 02.12.2016. None present for applicants. Mr. Muhammad Jabbar Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. R.P. Amer Advocate for respondent No.8. -.-.-. Order sheets shows that from the year 2013 till date applicants’ side after obtaining restraining orders has avoided to proceed with the matter. On 11.02.2013 The Court has adjourned the matter with certain observations. On 21.11.2014 no one was present on behalf of the applicants and the matter was again adjourned by way of an indulgence and as a last chance. On 03.11.2015 no one was present on behalf of the applicants neither there was any intimation. On 02.11.2016 none was present on behalf of applicants nor there was any intimation and certain observation was made which was again repeated on 16.11.2016. Today, again no one is present and this being an old matter, hence a fixed date and time was fixed. From the applicants’ side neither there is any intimation nor their Counsel is present to proceed with the matter. Consequently, this Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE
